studies.title: A RANDOMIZED, UNCONCLUSED, CONTROLLED CLINICAL STUDY TO EVALUATE THE EFFECTIVENESS AND SAFETY OF THE Ecovery APP IN PATIENTS WITH SUBACUTE TO CHRONIC UNSPECIFIC PAIN OF THE LOWER BACK

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the effectiveness and safety of the eCovery app in patients with subacute to chronic unspecific pain of the lower back. The product name 'eCovery' is mentioned multiple times in the trial description, and the manufacturer 'eCovery GmbH' is listed as the sponsor.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial, but it is a protocol without results, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies._rejection_reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial, but it is a protocol without results, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.
